steps.title: Notice the contrast
steps.content: The passage first gives a sleek, streamlined airplane as an example of aerodynamic design. It then turns to a boxy semitruck that encounters more wind resistance, so the blank must mark contrast.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast links
steps.content: Choice A signals a more specific detail, not an opposite example. Choice C signals causation. Choice D signals a conclusion. None fits the shift from a streamlined jet to a boxy truck.

steps.title: Choose the opposing side
steps.content: Choice B introduces the other side of the comparison: the semitruck is bulkier and less aerodynamic than the streamlined airplane. The answer is B.
